---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-03-02
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set

```text
+----------------+----------------------------+
| field          | value                      |
+----------------+----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                       |
| bill_id        | bill.family_map_wall_board |
| alias          | family_map_wall_board      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-02                 |
| total_eur      | 36                         |
| counterparty   | Möbelhaus Malmö AB         |
| project        | Family Map Wall            |
| related_entity | Ida Novak                  |
+----------------+----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | pin board        | 1   | 29       | 29       |
| 2 | colored map pins | 1   | 7        | 7        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 36       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Ida Novak. Added YAML frontmatter to three purchase records and preserved each original note body verbatim below frontmatter. Deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow (lowest filename, treat inbox as request, delete on completion), OCR/migration workflows, and finance schema requirements; preserved original body text in each migrated record.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak (00_inbox/000_next-task.md). Canonical entity identity confirmed via 10_entities/cast/ida.md. Search and reads of purchase records showed exactly three bills with related_entity Ida Novak, and each was updated to include required bill frontmatter fields and line items per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. After successful completion, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.

wrote YAML frontmatter + preserved original body in all 3 bill files
